corrections.text: Seven of the eight cited sources (leg.colorado.gov, coloradosun.com, tsscolorado.com, nixonpeabody.com, consumerfinancemonitor.com, clarkhill.com, hrdive.com) were not on the project's source allowlist at submission time. All are reputable legal-policy reporting or primary legislative-record outlets and were manually verified by the Chief Editor against the snapshot content.
